tier.essentialFeatures: Message the on-call coach · full app · groups

messages.comingSoon: Messaging launches with your coach assignment. Tap 'Talk to someone now' for immediate support.

referral.title: Work with a professional interventionist.
referral.body: Get matched with a vetted provider organization for assigned coaching, family sessions, and intervention support.

chat.headerSub: On-call coach · replies as soon as available · not for emergencies
chat.emptyState: This is your direct line to the on-call coach. Say hello — a real person reads this.
chat.crisisNote: In an emergency, always call 911 or 988.

coaching.cardTitle: Private Zoom session with a coach
coaching.cardBody: A full hour, one-on-one — your situation, your questions, a concrete plan. $150/hour.
coaching.title: Book 1:1 coaching
coaching.subtitle: {{rate}}/hour · private Zoom session
coaching.description: Tell us when you are available and what you want to work on. We confirm your time by message, you complete payment securely through PayPal, and your private Zoom link appears here.
coaching.timesPlaceholder: e.g. Weekday evenings after 6 PM Pacific, or Saturday mornings
coaching.noteLabel: What would you like to focus on? (optional)
coaching.notePlaceholder: Boundaries with my son, preparing for an intervention...
coaching.paymentNote: Payment is processed securely by PayPal in your browser. Your session is confirmed once payment and a time are matched. Cancellations 24+ hours ahead are fully refunded.
coaching.submitted: ✓ Request received. Complete payment in the PayPal window — we will confirm your time by message within one business day.
